violations.text: The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and bathroom were lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

Both back doors to the outside, located in the kitchen area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2026

Various food items were observed stored on the floor and less than 6 inches from the floor in the kitchen area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
Single use items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen area. Items must be at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the stand mixer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
The ceiling in the food prep and hand sink areas are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026

(Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table shelves) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The ceiling in the (3 bay area ) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2023

The ceiling tiles (acoustic composite material) is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor ceilings must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2024

The ceiling tiles by the 3 bay sink and in the food preparation area are constructed of acoustic tiles. This material is not durable. Materials for ceiling surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2023
